name: @g-cqd/apple-docs
description: Apple Developer Documentation CLI and MCP server — search, read, and browse Apple docs locally

scripts.bench: bun test/benchmarks/search-bench.js --record && bun test/benchmarks/highlight-bench.js --record && bun test/benchmarks/pipeline-bench.js --record && bun test/benchmarks/seed-bench.js --record
scripts.audit: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run lint:unused && bun run lint:duplication && bun run lint:size && bun run test:coverage
scripts.audit:report: mkdir -p reports && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bunx knip --reporter json > reports/knip.json; bunx jscpd src/ cli.js index.js; bun run test:coverage
scripts.ci: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun test --isolate
scripts.build:cli: mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-darwin-arm64 cli.js --outfile dist/apple-docs
scripts.build:cli:all: mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-darwin-arm64 cli.js --outfile dist/apple-docs-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-linux-x64 cli.js --outfile dist/apple-docs-linux-x64 && bun build --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-linux-arm64 cli.js --outfile dist/apple-docs-linux-arm64
